task_title: Which product draws the most complaints

scores.justification: The agent never successfully linked tickets to products via user orders; it found one ticket (t012) mentioning 'Acme integration' but could not trace it to specific products or orders, and did not systematically join tickets to products through the orders table.
The agent retrieved only the default 30 tickets with `--limit 30` and never verified whether all 30 tickets in the system were captured or attempted to fetch beyond that limit.

The agent identified p012 (Umbrella Tracker) as having high failure rates in orders (4 failed, 3 refunded out of 9 orders) but never connected this to support tickets; the final answer was not provided, and no product was definitively named with ticket evidence.

The agent did not provide a final answer with quotes from ticket subjects or bodies; the transcript ends without a summary statement citing specific ticket text to support a conclusion about which product generates the most complaints.
